news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

holdings.infoBox: TQQY is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are Us Dollars stock at 65.79%, United States Treasury Bills 3.545% at 23.71%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 10.57%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 0.76%, and Put Tqqq June 62.34 06/17/2026 at 0.49%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST QQQ ETF (TQQY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks to provide current income. The fund strategy involves writing put options on 3x daily leveraged ETFs tied to the Nasdaq-100 Index. TQQY was launched on Feb 26, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
